name: gamified
description: Gamified College Learning App — level up through learning tasks, find peers, message mentors, compete on batch leaderboards.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && node scripts/copy-web-public-to-root.cjs
